title: Don't Start ANY Claude Code Project Until You Watch This
summary: Austin Marchese offers three rules for building successfully with Claude Code, drawing from Y Combinator CEO Garry Tan's principles. The video covers what to build versus avoid, six leadership moves for AI team leadership, and a four-question test for project validation.
